caption: In a split-screen broadcast, Narendra Modi appears on the left, wearing a white kurta-pyjama and an orange and green scarf, while a seated audience is visible on the right. The audience members are mostly men wearing white clothing with saffron scarves. Modi is speaking and gesturing with his hands; in the initial frames, he raises his right hand, and later, he extends both arms. The background behind Modi consists of repeating lotus logos. The broadcast is framed by an orange border featuring the text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" and "दिल्ली" at the top, with "प्रजनमेनरी" appearing on the sides. At the bottom, the text "लाइव देखें" is displayed alongside social media handles including "/BJP4India" and the website "www.bjp.org/bjplive". The scene remains static in its composition, with only Modi's gestures and the slight movements of the audience changing as the video progresses.
